NeedDef.label: floxacine
NeedDef.description: Please, just delete the addiction. They shouldn't need floxacine. Floxacine isn't addictive and this shoudn't have appeared.

NeedDef.label: mechshroom
NeedDef.description: Because of a mechshroom addiction, this person needs to regularly consume the drug to avoid withdrawal symptoms.

NeedDef.label: soldier pill
NeedDef.description: Because of a soldier pill addiction, this person needs to regularly consume the drug to avoid withdrawal symptoms.

NeedDef.label: sunshine
NeedDef.description: Because of a sunshine addiction, this person needs to regularly consume the drug to avoid withdrawal symptoms.

NeedDef.label: tango
NeedDef.description: Because of a tango addiction, this person needs to regularly consume the drug to avoid withdrawal symptoms.
